title: Complete onboarding and unlock weekly guidance
description: An invited partner can complete the onboarding step and see the weekly review guidance unlock as the next stage in the loop.

steps.description: Navigate to /mvp/onboarding
Fill in the onboarding action field with a valid response
Submit the onboarding step
Verify the weekly review guidance is displayed
Verify the next recommended action is available

title: Complete weekly review and unlock today guidance
description: An invited partner can complete the weekly review action and see the today surface guidance become available as the next step.

steps.description: Navigate to /mvp/weekly
Fill in the weekly review action field with a valid response
Submit the weekly review step
Verify the today surface guidance is displayed
Verify the next recommended action is available

title: Complete reflection and close the weekly loop
description: An invited partner can complete the current reflection step and see the unlocked outcome that closes the weekly loop.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the login user field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the login password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Navigate to /mvp/reflection
Complete the current reflection step
Verify the reflection outcome is unlocked
Verify the weekly loop is shown as complete

title: Complete today action and unlock reflection guidance
description: An invited partner can complete the current today action and see reflection guidance as the next step in the loop.

steps.description: Navigate to /mvp/today
Fill in the today action field with a valid response
Submit the today action
Verify the reflection guidance is displayed
Verify the next recommended action is available

title: Read onboarding guidance before taking action
description: The onboarding surface shows the current partner action and the expected unlock before the step is completed.

steps.description: Navigate to /mvp/onboarding
Verify the current onboarding action is displayed
Verify the unlocked outcome for completing onboarding is displayed

title: Read weekly review guidance before taking action
description: The weekly surface shows the current action and the outcome it unlocks before completion.

steps.description: Navigate to /mvp/weekly
Verify the current weekly review action is displayed
Verify the unlocked outcome for completing the weekly review is displayed

title: Read today guidance before taking action
description: The today surface shows the current action and the unlocked outcome before the step is completed.

steps.description: Navigate to /mvp/today
Verify the current today action is displayed
Verify the unlocked outcome for completing today’s action is displayed

title: Return to reflection after completing the weekly loop
description: After completing the broader MVP flow, the reflection surface still presents the correct final close-the-loop guidance.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the login user field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the login password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Navigate to /mvp/onboarding
Complete the current onboarding step
Navigate to /mvp/weekly
Complete the current weekly step
Navigate to /mvp/today
Complete the current today step
Navigate to /mvp/reflection
Verify the final reflection guidance is displayed
Verify the weekly loop can be closed from reflection

title: See reflection guidance on entry
description: An invited partner can open the reflection surface and read the current action before taking any step.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the login user field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the login password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Navigate to /mvp/reflection
Verify the current reflection action is displayed
Verify reflection guidance specific to closing the loop is displayed

title: Keep reflection state after moving away and back
description: A completed reflection step remains completed when the user leaves the surface and returns to it.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the login user field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the login password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Navigate to /mvp/reflection
Complete the current reflection step
Navigate to /mvp/weekly
Navigate to /mvp/reflection
Verify the reflection step remains completed
Verify the unlocked outcome is still visible

title: Move between MVP surfaces and preserve progress
description: A partner can move from onboarding to weekly to today to reflection and keep the loop state visible across surfaces.

steps.description: Navigate to /mvp/onboarding
Complete the onboarding step with a valid response
Click the link to the weekly surface
Click the link to the today surface
Click the link to the reflection surface
Verify the reflection guidance is displayed
Verify the current action remains specific to the reflection surface

title: Show the same reflection guidance after reload
description: The reflection surface keeps showing the current action and unlocked outcome after the page is reloaded.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the login user field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the login password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Navigate to /mvp/reflection
Complete the current reflection step
Scroll the page
Navigate to /mvp/reflection
Verify the reflection completion state is preserved
Verify the unlocked next guidance remains visible

title: Return to onboarding and see the same guidance after reload
description: A partner can revisit onboarding after progress is made and still see the onboarding-specific guidance persist across navigation.

steps.description: Navigate to /mvp/onboarding
Fill in the onboarding action field with a valid response
Submit the onboarding step
Click the link to return to onboarding
Verify the onboarding guidance is displayed
Verify the completed state or next-step outcome is still visible

title: Require authentication for MVP surfaces
description: An unauthenticated visitor is prevented from viewing an MVP surface and is redirected or blocked according to the app’s auth-required behavior.

steps.description: Navigate to /mvp/onboarding
Verify the auth-required behavior is shown

title: Switch to reflection from another MVP surface
description: An invited partner can move from another MVP surface to reflection and see reflection-specific guidance instead of the previous surface's guidance.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the login user field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the login password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Navigate to /mvp/today
Click the link to reflection
Verify reflection guidance is displayed
Verify today surface guidance is no longer displayed

title: Handle an empty reflection action gracefully
description: If the reflection surface has no current action content, the user sees a clear empty state instead of a broken workflow.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the login user field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the login password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Navigate to /mvp/reflection
Verify an empty state message is visible
Verify no reflection action form is shown
